# dokploy_environment (Resource)

A custom (non-production) environment inside a Dokploy project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dokploy_environment" "staging" {
  project_id  = dokploy_project.app.id
  name        = "staging"
  description = "Staging environment"

  env = {
    LOG_LEVEL = "debug"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Environment name, e.g. `staging`. Do not use `production` (managed via dokploy_project).
- `project_id` (String) Project the environment belongs to. Changing this forces replacement.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Environment description.
- `env` (Map of String) Shared environment variables for all applications in this environment.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import dokploy_environment.staging <environmentId>
```
